   "source": [
    "# セグメント解析: 基本パイプライン\n",
    "\n",
    "**目的**: `SegmentTable` を使用して時刻キー付きデータ解析を管理する方法を学びます。\n",
    "\n",
    "`SegmentTable` は、特定の時間セグメントに関連付けられたメタデータとペイロードデータ（TimeSeries や PSD など）のコンテナです。大規模なデータセットを効率的に扱うため、遅延読み込みをサポートしています。"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "077e5ccd",
   "metadata": {
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 0.009965,
     "end_time": "2026-04-28T04:07:59.024916+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-28T04:07:59.014951+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": [
     "lang-ja"
    ]
   },
   "source": [
    "## 1. SegmentTable の作成\n",
    "\n",
    "GPS 開始・終了時刻を持つセグメントを定義した CSV ファイルからサンプルデータを読み込みます。"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 2,
   "id": "c88dce94",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {

       "1      4    8     B    (4.0, 8.0)\n",
       "2     10   13     C  (10.0, 13.0)\n",

       "4     22   25     E  (22.0, 25.0)"
      ]
     },
     "execution_count": 2,
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "execute_result"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "import warnings\n",
    "\n",
    "warnings.filterwarnings(\"ignore\", category=UserWarning)\n",
    "warnings.filterwarnings(\"ignore\", category=DeprecationWarning)\n",
    "\n",
    "from pathlib import Path\n",
    "\n",
    "from gwexpy.table import SegmentTable\n",
    "\n",
    "# Resolve the sample path robustly for both repo-root and notebook-dir execution.\n",
    "csv_candidates = []\n",
    "for root in [Path.cwd(), *Path.cwd().parents]:\n",
    "    csv_candidates.extend([\n",
    "        root / \"docs\" / \"_static\" / \"samples\" / \"sample_segment_data.csv\",\n",
    "        root / \"_static\" / \"samples\" / \"sample_segment_data.csv\",\n",
    "    ])\n",
    "\n",
    "sample_csv = next((path for path in csv_candidates if path.exists()), None)\n",
    "if sample_csv is None:\n",
    "    tried = [str(path) for path in csv_candidates]\n",
    "    raise FileNotFoundError(f\"Could not find sample_segment_data.csv. Tried: {tried}\")\n",
    "\n",
    "st = SegmentTable.read(str(sample_csv))\n",
    "\n",
    "print(st)\n",
    "st.display().head()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "584e5866",

   "source": [
    "## 2. セグメントの可視化\n",
    "\n",
    "セグメントのタイムラインを素早く可視化できます。"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 3,

   "metadata": {

   ],
   "source": [
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "\n",
    "fig, ax = plt.subplots()\n",
    "st.segments(ax=ax, label=\"Tutorial Segments\")\n",
    "plt.title(\"SegmentTable Timeline\")\n",
    "plt.show()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "e03cdf74",
   "metadata": {

   "source": [
    "## 3. ペイロードの遅延読み込み\n",
    "\n",
    "`SegmentTable` ではカラムに「ローダー」を紐付けることができます。データは実際にアクセスされたときのみ読み込まれます。"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 4,
   "id": "c9a04b7a",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-28T04:08:10.461044Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-28T04:08:10.460809Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-28T04:08:10.478648Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-28T04:08:10.477028Z"
    },
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 0.032667,
     "end_time": "2026-04-28T04:08:10.479224+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-28T04:08:10.446557+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": []
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "Loaded 4096 samples starting at GPS 0.0\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "from gwexpy.noise.wave import gaussian\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "def noise_loader(segment):\n",
    "    # Generate synthetic noise for the segment\n",
    "    duration = float(segment[1] - segment[0])\n",
    "    return gaussian(duration=duration, sample_rate=1024, t0=float(segment[0]))\n",
    "\n",
    "# Note: Use add_series_column for lazy-loadable payload data (kind='timeseries', etc.)\n",
    "st.add_series_column(\"noise\", loader=noise_loader, kind=\"timeseries\")\n",
    "\n",
    "# Accessing the first row's noise (triggers loading)\n",
    "data_0 = st.row(0)[\"noise\"]\n",
    "print(f\"Loaded {len(data_0)} samples starting at GPS {data_0.t0.value}\")"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "33708dd1",
   "metadata": {
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 0.00995,
     "end_time": "2026-04-28T04:08:10.609530+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-28T04:08:10.599580+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": [
     "lang-ja"
    ]
   },
   "source": [
    "## 4. 行ごとの処理\n",
    "\n",
    "行をイテレートしたり、`apply` を使ってデータを処理したりできます。"
   ]
  },

      ]
     },
     "execution_count": 5,
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "execute_result"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "# Calculate RMS for each noise segment\n",
    "# Use add_column for lightweight metadata results\n",
    "st.add_column(\"rms\", data=[row[\"noise\"].rms().value for row in st])\n",
    "st.display()"
   ]
  },
